@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent selected only four track_ids by querying tracks with LOWER(title) LIKE '%get me bodied%' and then summed Apple Music Canada sales for just those ids, missing additional Beyoncé "Get Me Bodied" duplicates, which led to an undercount (601.44 instead of 1059.46).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent identified candidate track_ids using a narrow title LIKE search and then summed Apple Music Canada revenue only for those ids (returning $601.44 from track_ids 4233 and 12954 per the sales query), failing to perform sufficient entity resolution to capture all duplicate records for Beyoncé’s “Get Me Bodied,” thus undercounting the total.
